title: archanthemis calcarea var. discoidea
intro: Archanthemis calcarea var. discoidea, also known as Artemisia discoidea, is a perennial herb native to the mountainous regions of China and Korea, belonging to the Asteraceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly as a digestive aid and to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The plant's health benefits include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and protect against oxidative stress. Archanthemis calcarea var. discoidea is typically prepared as a tea, infusion, or decoction, and can also be used in tincture form or as a topical application to harness its medicinal properties.
